name: In NYC, can courts force lawyers to disclose AI use in my personal injury filings?
description: Yes, NY judges often require AI disclosure and verification.[2]

mainEntity.name: In NYC, can courts force lawyers to disclose AI use in my personal injury filings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, NY judges often require AI disclosure and verification.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, some NY judges require AI disclosure, accuracy certification, and no confidential data input.[2] Ethics opinions mandate verification.[2] Key factors: hallucinations risk sanctions; client file retention of interactions; confidentiality checks.[2] Ask your lawyer's AI policy; demand transparency; ensure no case details fed to public AI.[2] Protected if compliant.
